violations.text: The hand-washing sink at the beverage storage area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026
The following were observed leaking when in use: -discharge pipe at handsink in back area -faucet handle at handsink in food prep area New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The restrooms and areas around ceiling behind signage have accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the warewashing area and beverage station. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -bottoms of beverage dispensing units -interior of oven -fanguards in walk-in cooler New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Faucet handles for handsink near oven was observed leaking when in operation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Surroundings of gated refuse area was observed with an accumulation of leaves and litter. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
